channel.title: Home on Samurai Smokey
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Samurai Smokey

item.description: The start of Smokey and Sage’s journey begins here!
The floor was unstable!? Smokey and Sage’s Journey continue in Chapter 2!
Where did Katie send Smokey and Sage!?

← Back to Vault

COMMISSIONS

A collection of commissions completed by me.
(I completed so many that if yours isn't on here and you want to download it, send me a quick message!)

← Back to Vault

FOOD CATS

A delicious collection of feline-inspired culinary characters and cozy designs.

← Back to Vault

NOVA

Illustrations and Concept art for Nova.

← Back to Vault

Personal Art

All of my personal and fan art.

← Back to Vault

SAMURAI SMOKEY

Concepts, character sheets, and cover art for the SS series.

← Back to Vault

SKULL KITTEN

Illustrations and concept art for Skull Kitten

item.title: About the Creator
item.description:
Hi, I’m GalileoCat. I’m an artist and the creator of Samurai Smokey.

  • Support me on Ko-fi
  • Follow me on Twitter

item.title: Chapter 1 - Sky Burns Black
item.description:
